name: Tavernhand
description: You worked at the local stop serving both your friends, rivals, first loves, and passing travelers. You've done a bit of everything there to gain some practical skills, but not enough to where you could run the place by yourself.

feats.name: Crowd Step
feats.description:
You’ve learned to move through packed tables, drunk patrons, and tight crowds.  
While **engaged by two or more enemies**, the **Dodge** action costs **1 AP less** (minimum 1).
